pages.text: The technique of anchoring the dead with Respawn Anchors and the craft of creating Necromancers have inspired you. Using the Ceramic Pithos of a Tomb Lord as a vessel, you have fashioned a Skull Lord Servant of your own. Should the Lord fall, you need only use a Respawn Anchor on the ceramic pithos it leaves behind to summon it back from death once more.
The departed who failed to achieve transcendence...
